chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No. D- 3634 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For katcha Peshi 3. For hearing of MA No 15755/2017 13.02.2018. Mr. Zulqernain Talpur Advocate for petitioner a/w petitioner Mr. Nasarullah Khaskheli Advocate for respondents No.8 to 10 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G a/w SIP Najamuddin On behalf of SSP Hyderabad -=-=- It appears from the record that controversy is running in between the parties i.e petitioner and private respondents over the construction of road from the lands of petitioner, which in our view is a question of fact which cannot be decided by this court in constitutional jurisdiction, even otherwise, the controversy is in between parties appears to be civil nature, therefore, this petition is dismissed alongwith listed application, however, the petitioner would be at liberty to approach the competent forum for redressal of his grievances. However, official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
